root: ^Valerie barely has time to remove her coat before someone is ringing the doorbell
^There's a couple standing, probably the meeting that Valentine was supposed to have
^Valentine is busy today so I hope you don't mind me taking his place, please come inside
^Valerie leads them into the bedroom and slowly removes her shirt, sitting on the bed
^From what I understand you're looking for couples toys, why don't I let you sample some of the ones we sell?
^As the couple both remove their clothes, Valerie sigals them to come closer
^The woman settles on the bed as Valerie places a hand around her back, but as her hand reaches a vibrator, she notices uncertainty in the eyes of the girl
^Or maybe you would like some time to think a bit more?
^Y-yes, maybe, it's just going a bit fast
^That's not a problem my dear, if you change your mind just give us another call
^The couple both apologize and leave the house
^Sounds like my evening plans got shortened, if they feel like it they will probably contact us back in a few days
^You reached the end of this jam game, maybe things will go better as packages are more swiftly delivered, you'll now be redirected to the main menu
